title: Harry Potter School Supplies 9.5 Inch Gryffindor Kids Mini Backpack with Art Kit
description:
Straight from the Wizarding World of Harry Potter, this Gryffindor Art Supplies Mini Backpack is perfect for Harry Potter fans who love to color, draw and be creative! The lightweight Harry Potter art supplies kids mini backpack comes with 6 felt art markers, 1 notebook, and 1 sticker sheet, all adorned with the Gryffindor House crest. Your Gryffindor student will love cozying up to work on their next masterpiece at home or maybe jotting down inspiration on the way to a Quidditch game. Made from lightweight polyester, the Harry Pottery Gryffindor back-to-school mini kids backpack is incredibly light and won’t add any extra weight or bulk to your little one’s load of school supplies; the straps are adjustable to ensure a great fit and also includes a carrying handle

Harry Potter School Supplies 9.5 Inch Gryffindor Kids Mini Backpack with Art Kit

Straight from the Wizarding World of Harry Potter, this Gryffindor Art Supplies Mini Backpack is perfect for Harry Potter fans who love to color, draw and be creative! The lightweight Harry Potter art supplies kids mini backpack comes with 6 felt art markers, 1 notebook, and 1 sticker sheet, all adorned with the Gryffindor House crest. Your Gryffindor student will love cozying up to work on their next masterpiece at home or maybe jotting down inspiration on the way to a Quidditch game.

Key Features

  • HARRY POTTER ART KIT BACKPACK: Straight from the Wizarding World of Harry Potter, this Gryffindor Art Supplies Mini Backpack is perfect for Harry Potter fans who love to color, draw and be creative! The lightweight Harry Potter art supplies kids mini backpack comes with 6 felt art markers, 1 notebook and 1 sticker sheet
  • HARRY POTTER GIFTS: Whether your little wizard in training is a fan of Hermione, Ron, or Harry Potter himself, this art kit and backpack will be a hit! Little wizarding fans will be able to show their love for the Harry Potter series, Gryffindor house and take the art supplies wherever they go, whether for school, playdates and more!
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMFORTABLE: Made from lightweight polyester, the Harry Pottery Gryffindor back to school mini kids backpack is incredibly light and won’t add any extra weight or bulk to your little one’s load of school supplies; the straps are adjustable to ensure a great fit and also includes a carrying handle
  • EASY TO KEEP CLEAN: Made from vinyl and polyester, the Harry Pottery mini kids school backpack is easy to wipe down or spot clean; if spilled milk or forgotten lunch food means a deeper clean is required, machine wash on a cold cycle and hang to dry
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8 x 2.5 x 10 inches; Color: Red, Yellow; Material: Polyester; Officially licensed Warner Bros. Harry Pottery merchandise

Product Specifications
